items.name: platform
items.doc: Platform-native window chrome and shell lifecycle utilities.

items.name: models
items.doc: Slint VecModel builders for ShellConfig (nav_model, toolbar_model).

items.name: ShellConfig
items.doc:
Full shell configuration — passed to AppAdapter::register_shell().
MenuBar is declared statically in the Window (.slint), not via ShellConfig.
S he ll co nf ig struct.

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new(platform: Platform, title: impl Into<String>) -> Self
items.doc: Create a new ShellConfig with the given platform and window title.

items.name: with_nav
items.signature: pub fn with_nav(mut self, items: Vec<NavItemConfig>) -> Self
items.doc: Set nav items. Replaces any previously set items.

items.name: with_toolbar
items.signature: pub fn with_toolbar(mut self, items: Vec<ToolbarItemConfig>) -> Self
items.doc: Set toolbar items. Also sets show_toolbar if items is non-empty.
